plan: plans/07032026-multi-location-billing (Phase A paid adds + Phase B cancellation)

items.title: Paid add: quote → purchase charges prorated delta → location created
items.precondition: Dev server on Stripe TEST keys; org 41 seeded with an active test-mode subscription (qty 1) and default test card
steps: 1. GET /api/billing/location-add-quote as org 41 admin — expect mode=quantity, unitAmount=200000, newQuantity=2, newMonthlyTotal=400000, proratedChargeNow > 0
2. POST /api/locations/purchase with { name, gbp(unused test GBP), expectedNewMonthlyTotal=400000 }
3. Verify response 201 with billing.chargedNow > 0 and location id
4. Verify Stripe: subscription quantity = 2, latest invoice billing_reason=subscription_update and paid
5. Verify DB: locations row exists with google_properties link
items.expected: Charge succeeds first, location exists after; amounts match the quote
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev run (clean sub sub_1TorEL…): quote mode=quantity unit=200000 newTotal=400000 prorated=199974; purchase 201, location id 35, chargedNow=199999; Stripe qty=2, invoice billing_reason=subscription_update status=paid amount_paid=199999. Earlier run also 201/paid (199975).
items.notes: Quote vs receipt drifts by seconds-of-proration (¢-level) — receipt amount returned in the response is authoritative.

items.title: Declined card: no charge completes, NO location is created
items.precondition: Org 41 test subscription's default payment method swapped to a declining test card (pm_card_chargeCustomerFail)
steps: 1. POST /api/locations/purchase with a fresh unused GBP
2. Expect 402 with error.code=PAYMENT_FAILED
3. Verify DB: no new locations row; Stripe quantity unchanged; proration invoice voided
items.expected: Transaction rolled back — nothing committed, nothing charged
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev run (clean sub): 402 PAYMENT_FAILED 'Your card was declined.', quantity stayed 2, latest invoice status=void, location absent. NOTE: first attempt exposed a REAL bug — Stripe does not pay update-proration invoices synchronously, so the original error_if_incomplete design let a declined card through; fixed by explicit finalize+pay with void+revert compensation (commit on branch), then re-proven.
items.notes: pm_card_visa_chargeDeclined declines at ATTACH; pm_card_chargeCustomerFail is the attach-ok/charge-fail card. Credit-polluted subs net proration to $0 which auto-pays — correct behavior (credits applied).

items.title: GBP reuse blocked with friendly 409 (One Endo silent-500 fixed)
items.precondition: Org 41 has a location whose GBP external_id is known
steps: 1. POST /api/locations/purchase using the already-linked GBP external_id
2. Expect 409 with error.code=GBP_ALREADY_LINKED (not a 500)
items.expected: Typed 409; no charge attempted, no row created
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev run: duplicate e2e-gbp-south → http=409 code=GBP_ALREADY_LINKED.

items.title: Available-GBP picker excludes already-linked profiles
items.precondition: Org admin with a REAL Google connection (endpoint fetches live GBP accounts)
steps: 1. GET /api/settings/properties/available/gbp
2. Verify the linked external_id(s) are absent from the response
items.expected: Linked profiles filtered server-side (fixes both add + change pickers)
items.notes: Not headlessly exercisable — the endpoint requires a live Google OAuth connection (seeded org 41 has fake tokens). The enforceable guarantee (server rejects reuse with 409) is proven by T3; the filter is covered by unit-level logic. Owner's UI pass on a real org confirms visually.

items.title: Billing card shows 'N locations × $X/mo = $Z/mo'
items.precondition: Org 41 with active test subscription (2 locations after T1)
steps: 1. GET /api/billing/status — verify locationBilling { locationCount, unitAmount, monthlyTotal }
2. Open Settings → Billing as org 41 admin (user visual pass)
3. Verify plan card shows the locations × price = total line
items.expected: API payload correct; card renders '2 locations × $2,000/mo' with '$4,000/mo'
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev run: locationBilling={locationCount:2, effectiveQuantity:2, unitAmount:200000, currency:usd, interval:month, monthlyTotal:400000, isFlatRate:false}.
items.notes: Visual rendering half is the owner's UI pass (component renders directly from this payload; FE type-gate green).

items.title: Legacy silent-create endpoint rejects org admins (payment bypass closed)
steps: 1. POST /api/locations with a valid body as the org admin
2. Expect 403 (Super Admin privileges required)
items.expected: Org admins cannot silently add locations any more
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev run: http=403 body='Access denied. Super Admin privileges required.'

items.title: Legacy remove still syncs quantity down
items.precondition: Org 41 with 2 locations and quantity 2 (after T1)
steps: 1. DELETE /api/locations/:id for the added location as org admin
2. Verify Stripe subscription quantity decrements (auto-prorated credit is existing behavior)
items.expected: Quantity sync fires on remove as before
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev runs: DELETE 200 → qty 3→2 (first run) and 2→1 (cleanup run) within ~4s of the fire-and-forget sync.
items.notes: Client remove is replaced by cancellation in Phase B.

items.title: STRIPE_MODE guard: mismatch fails boot; webhook livemode mismatch ignored
items.precondition: Local checkout of the branch with test keys
steps: 1. Locally: STRIPE_MODE=live with sk_test key → process must exit with the mismatch error
2. On dev (STRIPE_MODE=test set in dev.env): app boots, health green
3. stripe trigger checkout.session.completed (test) → delivered + processed (livemode matches)
items.expected: Boot-time fail-fast on mismatch; matching events processed normally
items.evidence: 2026-07-03: local boot with STRIPE_MODE=live + sk_test → 'REFUSED: [Stripe] STRIPE_MODE=live but STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is a test-mode key…'; dev.env has STRIPE_MODE=test (line 136), deploy boots + health healthy; synthetic trigger delivered, passed livemode guard, processed ('missing organization_id' = business logic reached).

items.title: Foreign-mode Stripe ids are inert on dev (prod-cloned org)
items.precondition: A dev org still carrying live-mode stripe ids (org 5, prod clone)
steps: 1. GET /api/billing/location-add-quote as that org's admin — expect mode=unavailable (200, not 500)
2. Check PM2 logs: warn-level 'unavailable/foreign mode' lines, no error stack
items.expected: Clean warn no-ops; no Stripe mutations attempted
items.evidence: 2026-07-03 dev run: org 5 admin quote → http=200 mode=unavailable; PM2 logs show level-40 '[LocationBilling] Billing objects for org 5 are unavailable with the configured Stripe key (foreign mode or stale clone)'.

items.title: Reset script: refuses under live keys, resets test org repeatably
items.precondition: Worktree checkout with .env on test keys
steps: 1. Run with STRIPE_SECRET_KEY temporarily set to an sk_live_ placeholder → exits code 2 with refusal
2. Run npm run billing:reset-test-org -- <orgId> → org's stripe columns nulled, status active
items.expected: Interlock enforced; reset works and is repeatable
items.evidence: 2026-07-03: live-key run → exit 2 with refusal text; test-key run against org 45 → columns nulled/reported per-field, admin-granted state confirmed.

items.title: Cancel (not last): pending status + quantity decrement with no proration
items.precondition: Phase B deployed to dev; org 41 with 2 active locations, test subscription qty 2
steps: 1. POST /api/locations/:id/cancel for the non-primary location
2. Verify response: status pending_cancellation, cancel_effective_at = period end, billing.action=quantity_decremented
3. Verify Stripe: quantity = 1, NO new invoice (proration none)
4. Verify the location still appears in GET /api/locations (usable until effective date)
items.expected: Current paid period untouched; next invoice lower; location stays usable
items.notes: Runs after Phase B merges to dev/dave (post-main-merge window per spec). Unit-covered meanwhile.

items.title: Reopen while pending: free restore
steps: 1. POST /api/locations/:id/reopen
2. Verify status active, cancel_effective_at cleared; Stripe quantity back to 2 with no new invoice
items.expected: No charge; subscription state fully restored

items.title: Last-location cancel schedules the whole subscription to end (with explicit UI warning)
steps: 1. Cancel the only active location from Settings → Properties
2. Verify the dialog shows the 'only active location — ends your subscription' warning
3. Verify Stripe: cancel_at_period_end=true; billing.action=subscription_ending
4. Reopen before period end → cancel_at_period_end cleared
items.expected: Subscription-level cancellation, reversible until period end

items.title: Reopen after cancelled: paid re-add via the Phase A prorated charge
items.precondition: A cancelled location on an org with an active subscription
steps: 1. POST /api/locations/:id/reopen
2. Verify 200 with billing.action=charged and chargedNow > 0; Stripe quantity incremented; proration invoice paid
3. Declined-card variant → 402 PAYMENT_FAILED, status stays cancelled
items.expected: Same consent + synchronous-pay semantics as adding a location

items.title: Finalizer flips due pending cancellations
items.precondition: A pending_cancellation row with a backdated cancel_effective_at on dev
steps: 1. Wait for the hourly minds-location-cancellation tick (or trigger the queue job manually)
2. Verify the row flips to cancelled with cancelled_at set; worker log line present
items.expected: Idempotent flip; no Stripe calls at finalize time

items.title: Cancelled locations: greyed in Properties, absent from the sidebar switcher
steps: 1. GET /api/locations → cancelled row absent; ?include_cancelled=true → present with status fields
2. Settings → Properties shows the row greyed with a Cancelled badge and only a Reopen action
3. Sidebar switcher does not list it; if it was the selected location, the app falls back to primary/first
items.expected: Visibility filtered, data retained, reopen path visible

items.title: No client-reachable delete path; data never removed
steps: 1. DELETE /api/locations/:id → 404 (route removed)
2. Verify Properties tab has no delete control
3. Verify a cancelled location's rows (google_properties, downstream tables) are untouched
items.expected: Cancellation is the only client lifecycle exit; retention absolute

items.title: Billing card shows the pending subtitle ('1 location ending <date>')
steps: 1. GET /api/billing/status → locationBilling.pendingCancellationCount=1 with nextEndingAt
2. Billing tab plan card shows the amber 'ending <date>' line under the totals
items.expected: Go-forward total plus the pending note
